title: Kenyan-Style Braised Cabbage with Red Cabbage
description: A hearty and flavorful cabbage dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring tender red cabbage and a rich braise sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped cabbage and cook until it begins to wilt, about 5 minutes.
Add the apple cider vinegar, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Braise the cabbage for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the braised cabbage hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
